title: Chups's sign pack for MTR - RZD
description:
v1.1 IS OUT! You most likely use v1.0!
Over 170 different signs of Russian Railways for Minecraft Transit Railway mod
body:
# v1.1 IS OUT! You most likely use v1.0!

![v1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26e21dad4222fb141a77c1d241a691858b8c48a6.png)

The resourcepack adds Russian Railways-style signs for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod.
The signs repeat the original style, colors and fonts, and are complemented by signs of our own design.

Credits: GrosBoy

The pack contains over 170 different signs, more will be added in the future.

You can find signs like:
- arrows;
- platform and track numbers;
- warning signs;
- navigation inside the rail terminal, etc.

**[https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) and [https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) required!**
